events.name: Borussia Dortmund at 1. FC Union Berlin

headlines.description: Borussia Dortmund scored in each half through Karim Adeyemi and Ian Maatsen to battle past Union Berlin 2-0 on Saturday and remain fourth in the Bundesliga.
headlines.shortLinkText: Dortmund battle past Union 2-0 to hold on to fourth place

video.headline: Karim Adeyemi puts Dortmund ahead with fantastic strike

tracking.trackingName: SOC_Highlight (Karim Adeyemi puts Dortmund ahead with fantastic strike) 2024/03/02 ESHEET

headlines.description: VfB Stuttgart top scorer Serhou Guirassy struck twice to guide them to a 3-2 victory at VfL Wolfsburg on Saturday, tightening their hold on third spot in the Bundesliga standings and closing in on Bayern Munich in second.
headlines.shortLinkText: Guirassy double guides Stuttgart 3-2 past Wolfsburg

video.headline: VfL Wolfsburg vs. VfB Stuttgart - Game Highlights

tracking.trackingName: SOC_One-Play (VfL Wolfsburg vs. VfB Stuttgart - Game Highlights) 2024/03/02 ESHEET
